## Summary


## Type of Change

- [ ] Docs
- [ ] Script
- [ ] SQL
- [ ] CloudFormation
- [ ] Dashboard / AI

## Validation

- [ ] `python -m py_compile ai/ask_dashboard.py`
- [ ] `python ai/ask_dashboard.py "How fresh is the dashboard?" --dry-run`
- [ ] Secret scan reviewed
- [ ] Cloud resources torn down if deployed

## Notes

Remove credentials, account IDs, passwords, and live endpoints before submitting.
